config.prompt: Write a dialogue between Gravity and Time. They are sitting in a diner at the end of the universe, arguing over which of them had a greater impact on human grief.

summary.prompt: Write a dialogue between Gravity and Time. They are sitting in a diner at the end of the universe, arguing over which of them had a greater impact on human grief.
summary.decoded_output:
Here are the two companions sitting in a booth as the universe unwinds beyond the edges 
Gravity leaned forward 
I pulled someone apart in slow motion 
Time simply shrugged 
Someone died eventually anyway 

Gravity threw a fried egg
Across Time 
That droplet represents decades 
Endlessly collected 
Thus beauty cloth between the longest pauses
